text:
is an artbook by Yoshiyuki Sadamoto published by Kadokawa Shoten on 31 January 2000.

Overview

The artbook features a collection of artwork done by Yoshiyuki Sadamoto. Most of them were made for the Neon Genesis Evangelion manga, but there are also illustrations for merchandise, posters, and concept art for the Neon Genesis Evangelion Proposal document. The end of the book is devoted to the other franchises for which Sadamoto participated: ', ', ', and ' among others.

Table of contents

Neon Genesis Evangelion 5
Shinji 6
Rei 16
Misato & Pen² 36
Color Page of Evangelion 42
Asuka 51
Cardass Masters 58
Poster of Films & LD Box 64
Drafts 64
Other Works 79
List of Works 113
Afterwords 118

Trivia

Der Mond means "The Moon" in German.
The limited version of the artbook included The Demon of the Lonely Isle ( 孤島の鬼 , Kotō no oni), a two-chapter manga by , in cooperation with Mako Takaha, which was originally published in .
